purpose: One-command local reviewer kit that runs GatePass lifecycle, adversarial scorecard, developer wrapper, local integration, and optional embedded-commerce summaries without live execution.
includedDemos: Embedded Commerce GatePass optional specialist scenario
corePhrases: GatePass is a scoped, time-bound, action-specific proof primitive for agent actions.
GatePass provides a common, machine-readable format for expressing authority, mandate, scope, freshness, and evidence.
Do not trust the agent. Trust the GatePass.

lifecycleSummary.demo: GatePass create / verify / reject round trip

scorecardSummary.demo: GatePass adversarial metrics and latency scorecard

timingSummary.note: Local illustrative timing only; values vary by machine and run and are not a production benchmark.

wrapperSummary.demo: GatePass developer wrapper and local integration example

safetyBoundary: Local deterministic reviewer kit only. No real tool execution, action execution, network calls, production middleware, production benchmark, security certification, payment authorisation, settlement authorisation, checkout, or live commerce integration.

commerceSummary.purpose: Deterministic local Embedded Commerce GatePass demonstrator for pre-checkout basket verification.
commerceSummary.corePosition: No mandate. No evidence. No verified intent. No signed GatePass. No settlement.
commerceSummary.commercePosition: No verified basket. No valid mandate. No current approval. No GatePass. No checkout.
commerceSummary.designPartnerPrinciple: We prove the trust architecture. The design partner funds the real integration.

paidEvaluationPilot.boundary: Subject to scope and written agreement; real integration is separate design-partner work.

commerceSummary.nonProductionStatus: Local deterministic synthetic evaluation only; no retailer, shopping-agent, checkout, payment, settlement, A2A, MCP, API, or production integration exists.
